properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thank the Lord for my blessings For all the ways He has kept me Oh-oh, I can’t forget how He saved my soul I’ve got a reason to praise the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I thank the Lord, He is faithful And when I’m low, He is able Oh-oh, I was alone when He opened the door I’ve got a reason to praise the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cause he woke me up, say Woke me up this morning Gave me a testimony I've got a reason I’ve got a reason and so many more Done so much for me Gave me the victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve got a reason to praise the Lord Woke me up this morning Woke me up this morning Gave me a testimony I've got a reason I’ve got a reason and so many more Done so much for me Gave me the victory I’ve got a reason (I’ve got a reason) I’ve got a reason (I’ve got a reason) I’ve got a reason to praise the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I thank the Lord, He’s my anchor And through the rain He’s my shelter Oh-oh, when trouble comes, I can rest in the storm I’ve got a reason to praise the Lord
